meta.title: Ahmad Khan — Digital Marketing Strategist | Meta Ads · SEO · SMM
meta.description: London-based digital marketing strategist. 7.36x ROAS on Meta Ads, organic growth to 48.5K followers, and SEO that compounds — paid, organic and SEO as one system.

hero.name: AHMAD ULLAH KHAN
hero.headline: Portfolio
hero.lead: A visual journey through my passion for digital marketing. From concept to creation, let's explore the stories and skills that define my work.
hero.sub: London-based digital marketing strategist helping ecommerce, B2B and lifestyle brands grow through paid ads, organic content and SEO working together as one system.

about.aboutBody: I am a versatile professional with expertise as a Creative Director, Social Media Strategist, and Designer. Combining creative leadership, strategic thinking, and design skills, I deliver impactful solutions that engage audiences and drive success. While most freelancers focus on one channel, I build full marketing strategies that drive consistent and compounding results across every touchpoint.
about.visionBody: My vision is to leverage the power of digital platforms to connect brands with their target audience in meaningful and authentic ways. By crafting compelling strategies and captivating content, I foster engagement, drive growth, and build lasting relationships between brands and their communities.
about.statsNote: I have served a diverse range of clients, delivering impactful creative and social media solutions.

services.heading: What I
services.intro: Every client gets a strategy built around their specific goals. No templates, no guesswork, no one-size-fits-all plans.
